## Description
Provide a summary of the changes introduced in this pull request and the rationale.

## Related Issues
Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Chore / Documentation / Quality Refactor

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (flake8, black, isort).
- [ ] I have written unit/integration tests for my changes.
- [ ] All tests pass locally via `pytest`.
- [ ] I have documented any environment variable changes.
- [ ] My Docker containers build successfully locally.
